message:
fix: prevent tour panic on empty layout areas and fix showcase interaction bugs

- TourHighlight::resolve() panicked with clamp(1, 0) on empty areas;
  now handles zero-sized regions gracefully (added regression test)
- Panel hit rect drift: 4 showcase screens cached outer panel rects for
  mouse hit testing instead of inner content rects; clicks on borders
  could select wrong rows. Fixed action_timeline, performance,
  terminal_capabilities, and log_search to cache inner rects.
- Hyperlink playground: keyboard actions (Enter, Space, copy) now target
  the visually active link (hover or focus) instead of a stale focused
  index, reconciling display and action ownership.
- Kanban drag-drop: drop completion now uses stable card_id to find the
  card instead of the stale source_row index, preventing wrong-card
  moves when the board is mutated mid-drag.

Closes #38

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
